meta.title: Cyber Nationalism: Dilemmas of Offense and Defense Playing Out in Critical Networks
meta.description:
Ben Buchanan has a new book out called The Cybersecurity Dilemma (he did a book signing at S4x17 after this talk). In this video he covers 3 main propositions:

1) Nations need to intrude into networks in advance of conflict for successful offensive operations

2) Intrusions into adversaries networks and 3rd party networks are necessary to improve a nation's defense

3) Suffering an intrusion into a network is deeply concerning ... a threat you are worried about.

If you believe these three the cybersecurity dilemma is easy to see. A nation does not know if an intrusion into their network is a precursor to an offensive action or an effort to improve their defense. And the original motivation and purpose can change.
